abilities.name: Power Strike
abilities.description: A heavy blow that hits harder than a basic attack.

abilities.name: Coin Toss
abilities.description: Spend currency to deal a quick burst of damage.

abilities.name: Pummel
abilities.description: A rapid flurry of bare-handed strikes.

abilities.name: Steal
abilities.description: Attempt to steal an item from an enemy.

abilities.name: Throw
abilities.description: Hurl a throwing knife at the enemy.

abilities.name: Pray
abilities.description: A modest prayer that restores some HP to the party.

abilities.name: Parry
abilities.description: Prepare to reduce the next physical hit.

abilities.name: Counter
abilities.description: Prepare to counter the next physical hit.

abilities.name: Cover
abilities.description: Guard an ally from the next hit.

abilities.name: Sky Lance
abilities.description: Leap out of reach, then dive onto a foe on the next turn.

abilities.name: Focused Strike
abilities.description: Hold your stance, then unleash a crushing blow next turn.
